name: Flooding Altar
trigger: Lifting the violet gem off the bone altar
detect: DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) — the altar top sits a hair proud of its base, like a plate on a spring
disarm: DC 12 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) with thieves' tools to wedge the plate before the gem comes off
save: DC 13 Strength, or be knocked prone by the surge
effect: Sluice gates grind open and black water roars in. Every creature in the chamber makes the save; the water rises one step per round and after 3 rounds the whole floor is difficult terrain.

name: Scything Blade
detect: DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) — a thin vertical seam in the stairwell wall
disarm: DC 12 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) to jam the pressure plate
effect: A rusted blade sweeps across the stairs at knee height. On a hit the target also falls prone.
